channel.title: Dropout Presents
channel.description: Latest releases from Dropout Presents on Dropout.tv

item.title: Michael Cruz Kayne: Sorry For Your Loss
item.description:
Michael Cruz Kayne reflects on his son's death and society's relationship with grief.

Duration: 1:07:55

Tags: Dropout Presents, stand up comedy, improv, laughing, michael cruz kayne, death, grief, sadness, tragedy, pregnancy, family, parents, tutoring, optimism, powerpoint, ted talks, dark comedy

item.title: Get Your Act Together with Michael Cruz Kayne
item.description:
Michael Cruz Kayne discusses the impact of grief and how that shaped his new comedy special.

Duration: 11:10

Tags: Dropout Presents, stand up comedy, improv, laughing, michael cruz kayne, death, grief, sadness, tragedy, pregnancy, family, parents, tutoring, optimism, powerpoint, ted talks, dark comedy, josh sharp, behind the scenes
